title: corybas kinabaluensis
intro: Corybas kinabaluensis, also known as the Kinabalu corybas or Sabah corybas, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the mountainous regions of Borneo, specifically in the Kinabalu National Park. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its rhizome, which is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The rhizome of the Corybas kinabaluensis is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections, while also promoting overall health and well-being. In traditional herbal preparations, the rhizome is often dried and used as a decoction or infused in hot water to create a medicinal tea, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
